Localization.Description: An attempt to create an account using the command line or PowerShell is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A potential attempt to create an account using the command line is detected on host {event_src.host}
A potential attempt to create an account using PowerShell is detected on host {event_src.host}
The creation of the {datafield10} account using the command line is detected on host {event_src.host}
The creation of the {datafield10} account using PowerShell is detected on host {event_src.host}
